overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence from a flight simulator game, walking across dry grassy terrain toward a waterfront harbor. The camera approaches a large gray submarine docked near industrial warehouses, revealing the vessel in detail against a backdrop of distant city buildings and clear blue skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy field near industrial harbor buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across dry grassy terrain toward the distant waterfront, with industrial buildings visible to the right

entered.detail: plain white industrial building with flat roof on the right side of the frame
long low buildings with red-brown roofs extending along the right side
cluster of tall buildings and skyscrapers visible on the horizon
brownish dry grass with scattered white wildflowers covering the ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide grassy field with dry vegetation under a clear blue sky. A white concrete industrial building stands prominently on the right, while a distant city skyline is visible ahead. The camera moves forward steadily across the terrain toward the harbor area.

events.description: large gray submarine becomes visible in the harbor water ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward while turning slightly left toward the water, approaching the submarine

entered.detail: calm greenish-blue water of the harbor basin
large gray military submarine with conning tower and deck gun floating in the harbor
long concrete pier structure extending into the water

segments.scene_description: As the camera approaches the waterfront, the harbor water comes into view with a massive gray submarine suddenly visible floating near the shore. The industrial warehouses recede into the distance on the right while the city skyline shifts to the left. The camera continues moving toward the submarine along the grassy shore.

events.description: camera slows slightly while approaching the submarine for detailed inspection

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the water's edge, closely observing the submarine's hull and conning tower

segments.scene_description: The camera moves very close to the submarine, which now dominates the center of the frame revealing its detailed hull, conning tower, and deck structures. The water appears clear and shallow near the shore, and the industrial buildings remain visible in the far right background. The scene ends with an intimate view of the vessel's bow and hull number.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement across a dry landscape that transitions from an open grassy field into an intimate encounter with a massive naval vessel. It begins by traversing wide, arid vegetation under a clear blue sky, passing a white concrete industrial building on the right while a distant city skyline looms ahead. As the camera reaches the waterfront, the harbor water emerges and a massive gray submarine comes into view, causing the industrial warehouses to recede and the skyline to shift toward the left. The scene then closes in on the vessel, which expands to dominate the frame and reveals the intricate details of its hull and conning tower against the shallow shore. Finally, the camera glides toward the bow, ending with a focused view of the submarine's hull number.
